headline: A New Chapter for Chemung Speedrome
subheadline: Same track. Stronger foundation. Racing that's worth the drive.
story:
Chemung Speedrome has been a fixture of local motorsport for decades. Friday nights at the ridge are where local drivers sharpen their skills, families fill the grandstands, and the kind of close, hard-fought racing you can't find anywhere else plays out under the lights. That legacy matters to us — it's why we're here.

Under new ownership, Chemung Speedrome is being run with a clear commitment: make the on-track product as good as it can be. That means enforcing rules consistently, investing in the facility, and treating every driver and every fan with respect. We're not reinventing what made this place worth showing up to — we're protecting it and building on it.

We're excited for the 2026 season and grateful for the community that's stuck with this track through the years. Come out, bring someone new, and see what Chemung Speedrome looks like with fresh energy behind it.
ownerMessage: We took on Chemung Speedrome because we believe in what local short-track racing means to this community. Our job is to run a clean, fair, exciting program every race night — and to earn your trust by doing exactly that, week after week.

values.title: Fair Competition
values.description: Rules are enforced consistently, tech is run straight, and every driver competes on the same terms. No exceptions.

values.title: Safety First
values.description: Driver safety and fan safety are non-negotiable. We maintain the track, the equipment, and the procedures to back that up.

values.title: Real Racing
values.description: We put four competitive divisions on the track because local motorsport is best when the card is full and the competition is genuine.

values.title: Community
values.description: Chemung Speedrome belongs to this community. We're here to serve drivers, families, and fans who make Friday nights at the track worth having.

metaDescription: Chemung Speedrome is under new ownership and committed to fair competition, great racing, and a revitalized experience for local motorsport fans.
